metadata.name: Homepage
metadata.description: Modern, fully static, fast application dashboard with integrations for over 100 services and translations into multiple languages.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Modern, fully static, fast application dashboard with integrations for over 100 services and translations into multiple languages.

## How to Use
This template renders `compose.yaml` as a file.

1. Decide on service names, ports, volumes, credentials, and optional integrations before rendering the stack.
2. Fill in the required variables first, then enable optional sections such as Traefik, metrics, or extra services only when needed.
3. Render the Compose project, review the generated files, and start it with Docker Compose in the target directory.

## Variable Guide
### General
- `service_name`: Name of the service; required; default: homepage.
- `container_name`: Name of the container; optional; default: homepage.
- `container_timezone`: Timezone used inside the container; optional.
- `container_loglevel`: The container log level; optional; options: debug, info, warn, error.
- `restart_policy`: The container restart policy; required; default: unless-stopped; options: unless-stopped, always, on-failure, no.

### Ports
- `ports_http`: Host port exposed for HTTP; required; default: 3000; shown when: traefik_enabled=false.

### Traefik
- `traefik_enabled`: Enable Traefik integration; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_host`: Hostname used for Traefik; optional.
- `traefik_domain`: Domain used for Traefik; required.
- `traefik_entrypoint`: Entrypoint name; required; default: web.
- `traefik_network`: Network used for Traefik; required; default: traefik.
- `traefik_tls_enabled`: Enable Traefik TLS; optional; default: false.
- `traefik_tls_entrypoint`: Entrypoint name; required; default: websecure; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.
- `traefik_tls_certresolver`: Traefik Tls Certresolver; required; default: cloudflare; shown when: traefik_tls_enabled=true.

### Volume
- `volume_mode`: Mode used for Volume; required; default: local; options: local, mount, nfs.
- `volume_mount_path`: Mount path used for the volume; required; default: /mnt/storage; shown when: volume_mode=mount.
- `volume_nfs_options`: The NFS mount options; optional; default: nfsvers=4,soft,timeo=180,intr.
- `volume_nfs_path`: Export path on the NFS server; optional; default: .
- `volume_nfs_server`: Hostname or IP address of the NFS server; optional; default: .

## References
- [Homepage](https://gethomepage.dev/)
- [Documentation](https://gethomepage.dev/latest/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/gethomepage/homepage)
